prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Dipole moment magnitude (|μ|) in Debye.
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) as implemented in xtb 6.x (via chemkit).
Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates from /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/electrostatics-validation/acetonitrile/acetonitrile.xyz; single-point only (no further relaxation).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet).
SCF convergence: xtb self-consistent charge cycles converged; no warnings were reported.
Live log & reproducibility: the run streamed a live electrostatics_*.out log to the working directory (path appears in the CLI header); full command recorded in the result JSON’s cli_invocation field.

Result
Dipole moment |μ| = 3.87205 D
(partial charges: Mulliken, sum ≈ 0 as expected; total energy −236.3839 eV).
